name: Sesame Chicken
recipeIngredient: salt and pepper -- to season chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 4 pieces, using only the breast, legs, and thighs.
2. Wash the chicken with lemon juice and season with a little salt and pepper. Chill for 2 hours.
3. Beat the egg with chicken broth.
4. Mix sesame seeds, flour, salt, and paprika in a plastic bag.
5. Remove skin from the chicken pieces.
6. Shake the chicken pieces in the bag with the sesame mixture.
7. Dip each piece into the egg mixture and shake again to coat well.
8. Fry the pieces in hot oil until golden brown.
9. Transfer the fried pieces to a baking dish.
10. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 to 50 minutes.
